stable_facts: Jensen Huang is the founder and CEO of Nvidia
Nvidia is headquartered in Santa Clara California
Nvidia designs graphics processing units and AI chips
expected_patterns: mentions Nvidia revenue or quarterly earnings figure
mentions Blackwell or next generation AI chip architecture
mentions data center revenue as primary business segment
mentions US export controls or China restrictions as a risk
mentions competition from alternative chips or hyperscaler custom silicon
includes numbered citations linking to sources
forbidden_content: Jensen Huang stepped down or resigned
Nvidia primarily makes gaming hardware with no AI business
notes: Nvidia is the dominant AI infrastructure company. High positive sentiment expected. Key risks are US-China export controls and hyperscaler custom chip development. Brief must mention AI data center as core business.
